key_evidence: April 6 Troutdale PDX9 worker (46) died on warehouse floor; management directed continued work around body 1+ hour
Death unreported publicly for one week; broken April 13 by Western Edge
Oregon OSHA 'not work-related for reporting purposes' classification used by Amazon as PR shield
2019 Reveal data already showed PDX9 as worst-injury-rate facility of 23 analyzed; no remediation
March 2026 Teamsters right-to-strike settlement (positive INT counterweight)
EFF/Amnesty/Access Now May 7 joint letter explicitly names Amazon for human-rights accountability
rationale: Composite delta -3.7 is below 5pt change threshold. EMP dimension shows largest single-event negative anchor (E1/E4 at 1). Boundary watch elevated. Forward signal: OSHA investigation outcome, and any second comparable event, would trigger reconsideration.
